justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical with TOCTOU explicitly named; atomic fix proposed with specific SQL (SELECT FOR UPDATE + row count check); safe_to_deploy is false; partial failure (cart add before decrement) identified as a separate Critical finding; confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU named explicitly in the first critical finding title
Two specific atomic fix approaches given: SELECT FOR UPDATE and atomic WHERE stock >= $quantity with row count check
Partial failure risk elevated to its own Critical finding with clear reproduction steps
Operation ordering issue noted — decrement after cart add amplifies corruption window
Input validation on quantity identified as a High finding, including negative quantity exploit
Idempotency gap identified as an important issue
Suggested CHECK constraint as database-level safety net

trials.justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical, atomic fix proposed (SELECT FOR UPDATE with transaction), TOCTOU named in summary, safe_to_deploy false, partial failure (cart add before decrement) noted as separate Critical finding, confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU race condition clearly identified with detailed reproduction steps showing two concurrent users
Atomic fix is specific: SELECT FOR UPDATE with transaction wrapper, including code example
Partial failure risk (addItem succeeds, decrementStock fails) called out as separate Critical finding
Bonus: identified negative quantity input validation issue as a real exploit vector
Mentioned optimistic concurrency as alternative to pessimistic locking in suggestions
Noted operation ordering concern (decrement before add is safer) as important issue
